\section{Professional Summary}
A proactive ServiceNow Developer with over 3 years of IT experience, specializing in implementing and supporting ServiceNow modules including ITSM and custom applications. Proven expertise in advanced platform development using JavaScript, Glide Scripting, and Flow Designer, with a strong focus on integration and process optimization. Adept at delivering complex solutions and ensuring platform stability through robust development and operational practices.
